plugins.name: data-engineering
plugins.description: Package management, AST indexing, scheduled tasks, and Supabase with Cube.js semantic layer. Manage monorepo dependencies, rebuild tree-sitter indexes, schedule recurring agents, and define semantic models.

plugins.name: frontend-engineering
plugins.description: Frontend engineering skills for Netlify deployments, edge functions, serverless functions, caching, image CDN, forms, blobs, database, AI gateway, and framework-specific guidance for Next.js, Astro, Vite, and TanStack. Based on tobinsouth/context-and-tools.

plugins.name: integration-engineering
plugins.description: Claude Code integration skills — Dispatch, Remote Control, Channels (Telegram, Discord, iMessage), Slack, and Scheduled Tasks. Work away from your terminal with mobile, chat bridges, webhooks, and cron automation.

plugins.name: analytics-engineering
plugins.description: Telemetry analytics for Claude Code agent sessions. Supabase OTel pipeline — session history, tool performance, cost tracking, error rates. Based on jadecli/jadebot PR #222.

plugins.name: software-dev-manager
plugins.description: Org-level Claude Code usage monitoring, cost management, and knowledge worker analytics. OTel setup, token tracking, budget controls, adoption dashboards, per-role ROI, and TPM/RPM capacity planning.
